productDisplayName: Nike Men Deep Red White Sports Shoes
description: With plush cushioning and a supportive Fit, the nike 2.04 SL running shoe is perfect for those who love those healthy runs. Lightweight and comfortable, this shoe also doubles up as a great everyday wear for those who enjoy long walks.UpperSynthetic upper for enhanced durability and styleMeshed and padded tongue and sockliner for all-day comfortGilly lacing system for a supportive fit and to lock the foot in place MidsoleDual-density phylon midsole for a unique blend of lightweight cushioning and enhanced impact protectionMoulded piping on the firmer density foam to act as a crash pad for smoother transition from heel strike to toe offCushioned fabric footbed for all-day comfortOutsoleTPR outsole with multi-directional lugs on the forefoot for optimal traction on various surfaces Forefoot flex grooves for a more natural range of motionDecoupled heel with a mid-heel scoop for enhanced grip and traction, and enhanced impact protection to the backfoot and anklesArched midfoot for inner arch supportShoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
